Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2075 0 0}Hey, you know, the two of you would totally get along.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}He actually wanted to know more about Gekkoukan High, so naturally I had to share my wisdom with him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, he's a real cool dude to hang with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2075 0 0}We just ran into each other earlier and started talking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}He actually wanted to know more about Gekkoukan High, so naturally I had to share my wisdom with him.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Anyways, he's a real cool dude to hang with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}Thanks especially for telling me who's in the "Top Ten Cuties of Gekkoukan High," too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 0 25 25}If Yuka-tan hears about this, my rep's gonna go down the toilet![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}Ohoho! Look at who's showing interest all of a sudden![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Well then, I'd like your opinion, too. It's a very serious matter, see.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2113 0 0}Dude, quit rubbing salt into my wound! I'm just an easily misunderstood fella, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14030 0 0}Hahaha, you two are pretty close, huh.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}I hope we can also be good friends, too, {f 4 2}-kun, since we're both transfer students and all.[n]{f 1 1}
